title: Game Evangelion Battle Orchestra Story Modes
display_title: Game Evangelion Battle Orchestra Story Modes
wikitext:
[]: [Game] Evangelion Battle Orchestra Story Modes             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sat Aug 15, 2015 1:45 am I've been playing Eva Battle Orchestra Portable a lot of late, and I thought it might be fun to share some of the Story Mode scenarios for anyone who hasn't seen them! My primary focus was on the three "non-canon" storylines with Eva-03, Eva-04 and the Type Beta. Eva-03/Toji: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Fi0cihgJBAs Eva-04/Kensuke: https://youtu.be/GAZQ39fgWhs Eva-β/Kaworu https://youtu.be/8RnGsE8p4Co The quality's on the low-side, unfortunately. My computer is a sad sack that was not made to handle video capture. I have a recording of Rei's story mode too, so if there's any interest, I'll upload the other three! Edit: Here's Eva-00/Rei! https://youtu.be/tnunfsiCTUQ And here are Shinji's: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oO1dGqlGR9Y and Asuka's: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bgjjaWw9FOU That's all six!

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Aug 16, 2015 8:18 pm On the Gaghiel stage do you die if you fall off a ship? The MRLS providing backup gets too excited and does this.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Aug 16, 2015 8:32 pm Nah, you take about 1/8 damage and respawn on top of an Eva carrier that flies in from the right. The MRLS had admirable enthusiasm. It almost made that jump!

Article: Game Evangelion Battle Orchestra Story Modes
[]: [Game] Evangelion Battle Orchestra Story Modes             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sat Aug 15, 2015 1:45 am I've been playing Eva Battle Orchestra Portable a lot of late, and I thought it might be fun to share some of the Story Mode scenarios for anyone who hasn't seen them! My primary focus was on the three "non-canon" storylines with Eva-03, Eva-04 and the Type Beta. Eva-03/Toji: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Fi0cihgJBAs Eva-04/Kensuke: https://youtu.be/GAZQ39fgWhs Eva-β/Kaworu https://youtu.be/8RnGsE8p4Co The quality's on the low-side, unfortunately. My computer is a sad sack that was not made to handle video capture. I have a recording of Rei's story mode too, so if there's any interest, I'll upload the other three! Edit: Here's Eva-00/Rei! https://youtu.be/tnunfsiCTUQ And here are Shinji's: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=oO1dGqlGR9Y and Asuka's: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=bgjjaWw9FOU That's all six!

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Sun Aug 16, 2015 8:18 pm On the Gaghiel stage do you die if you fall off a ship? The MRLS providing backup gets too excited and does this.

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sun Aug 16, 2015 8:32 pm Nah, you take about 1/8 damage and respawn on top of an Eva carrier that flies in from the right. The MRLS had admirable enthusiasm. It almost made that jump!
